description: 워크트리 머지 프로세스 완료율 및 커밋 메시지 품질 측정

commit_message_quality.check: conventional commit format, imperative mood, grouped changes, Co-Authored-By

safety_checks.check: worktree verified, conflicts handled, no force operations

evals.name: 커밋 메시지 품질 평가
evals.setup: Create a worktree with 5+ commits across 3 categories (feat, fix, refactor)
evals.prompt: 이 워크트리의 변경사항을 분석하고 커밋 메시지를 작성해주세요 (머지는 하지 마세요).

summary_line.check: imperative mood, under 72 chars, no period

body_paragraph.check: explains why and context, not just what

changes_grouping.check: related items grouped, most important first
